label: Special operations and strategic strikes
scope: Operations suited to short, high-intensity scenario design where intelligence, timing, and surprise matter more than wave endurance.

operations.name: Operation Entebbe
operations.summary: A long-range special operations raid that rescued hostages held at Entebbe Airport, relying on intelligence, surprise, and precise execution.
historicalDynamics: mission success depended on intelligence quality
timing failures could collapse the entire raid

candidateObjectives: secure hostages before alert level maxes out
identify the correct objective room using intelligence clues
minimize collateral losses while racing the clock
mechanicIdeas: alarm meter that spawns stronger defenders if mistakes stack
extraction phase after rescue rather than immediate victory

operations.name: Operation Opera
operations.summary: A long-range Israeli airstrike against Iraq's Osirak reactor, built around a narrow timing window and careful route planning.
historicalDynamics: single-mission success mattered more than sustained combat
route planning and fuel constraints shaped the operation
surprise had to hold until weapons release

candidateObjectives: choose a strike package that can survive a single pass
cross long distance without exhausting mission resources
mechanicIdeas: fuel budget represented as a hard mission resource
one-pass damage scoring rather than endless attrition

operations.name: Operation Orchard
operations.summary: A covert Israeli airstrike in Syria associated with a suspected nuclear facility, remembered for secrecy, deception, and precision.
historicalDynamics: limited visibility and political ambiguity framed the mission
covert success depended on remaining below escalation thresholds
the strike was strategically significant despite short duration

candidateObjectives: complete a precise mission while keeping escalation hidden
avoid detection thresholds that trigger a wider confrontation
favor intelligence and preparation over brute force
mechanicIdeas: stealth score that affects post-mission fallout
electronic warfare buffs with limited charges
campaign branch outcome based on whether the strike stays covert
